title: Dream Journey 2: Princess Iron Fan
overview: A volcano wreaks havoc in Sun Wukong's world, sapping the magic banana leaf fan of its power. He must travel five centuries into the past to coax tears from the dry eyes of Princess Iron Fan, but he arrives with no memory of who he is.
